ddls:
CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that released the announcement */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry category of the announcement */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic category of the announcement */,
  "released_at" TEXT /* Date and time the announcement was released */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the announcement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the announcement (e.g., Draft, Scheduled, Released, Archived) */,
  "scheduled_at" TEXT /* Scheduled release date and time */,
  "compliance_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the announcement meets regulatory requirements */,
  "audit_logs" TEXT /* Reference to the audit logs for the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "industry_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of industry IDs the company belongs to */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "legal_name" TEXT /* Legal name of the company */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the company was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent industry (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the industry category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_parent_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent topic (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the topic category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the language is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., company admin, legal officer, compliance officer) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
